recommended_usage.print: Prefer SVG for posters and slides when possible.
recommended_usage.presentation: Use PNG for quick drop-in placement in PowerPoint, Keynote, or LaTeX.
recommended_usage.quiet_zone: Keep white space around the code and avoid placing text or graphics too close.
